revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Ibuki-jinja (Tarui)]][[ja:伊富岐神社]] {{Expand Japanese|伊富岐神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ibuki Shrine | native_name = 伊富岐神社 | image = Ibuki-Jinjya-Tarui05.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ibuki Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.37714|136.494758}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Ibuki Shrine'''|伊富岐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Ni-no-Miya|lt=Ni-no-Miya|qid=Q134917533|1=Ni-no-Miya}} ** P1001: {{ill|Mino Province|lt=Mino Province|ckb|پارێزگای مینۆ|cs|Mino (provincie)|de|Provinz Mino|en|Mino Province|es|Provincia de Mino|eu|Mino probintzia|fa|ولایت مینو|fr|Province de Mino|gl|Provincia de Mino|hak|Mî-nùng-koet|id|Provinsi Mino|it|Mino (provincia)|ja|美濃国|ko|미노국|lt|Mino žemė|nl|Mino (provincie)|pt|Província de Mino|ru|Мино (провинция)|simple|Mino Province|sk|Mino (provincia)|sr|Провинција Мино|th|แคว้นมิโนะ|tr|Mino (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Міно|vi|Tỉnh Mino|wuu|美濃国|zh_min_nan|Mino-kok|zh_yue|美濃國|zh|美濃國|qid=Q864156|1=Mino Province}} * {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11609223|ltq=Q11609223|qid=Q11609223|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mino Province}} ** Series ordinal: 7 ** P155: {{ill|Tairyō Shrine|lt=Tairyō Shrine|ja|大領神社|qid=Q11441891|1=Tairyō Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11666826|ltq=Q11666826|qid=Q11666826|1=Yagi Shrine (Ikeda)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q1345531|ltq=Q1345531|qid=Q1345531|1=Tarui, Gifu}} * {{ill|Mino Province|lt=Mino Province|ckb|پارێزگای مینۆ|cs|Mino (provincie)|de|Provinz Mino|en|Mino Province|es|Provincia de Mino|eu|Mino probintzia|fa|ولایت مینو|fr|Province de Mino|gl|Provincia de Mino|hak|Mî-nùng-koet|id|Provinsi Mino|it|Mino (provincia)|ja|美濃国|ko|미노국|lt|Mino žemė|nl|Mino (provincie)|pt|Província de Mino|ru|Мино (провинция)|simple|Mino Province|sk|Mino (provincia)|sr|Провинција Мино|th|แคว้นมิโนะ|tr|Mino (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Міно|vi|Tỉnh Mino|wuu|美濃国|zh_min_nan|Mino-kok|zh_yue|美濃國|zh|美濃國|qid=Q864156|1=Mino Province}} * {{ill|Q521316|ltq=Q521316|qid=Q521316|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.37714|136.494758}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Ibuki-Jinjya-Tarui05.JPG == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Q135037878|ltq=Q135037878|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20160306024853/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/220401.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181929 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} * {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|ko|종4위|zh|從四位|qid=Q11071127|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いぶきじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9200005004942 == Commons category (P373) == * Ibuki-jinja (Tarui) == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県不破郡垂井町岩手字伊吹1484-1', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Ibuki-jinja (Tarui)}} [[JA:伊富岐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11379321}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Ibuki Shrine | 画像=[[Image:Ibuki-Jinjya-Tarui05.JPG|270px]]
Haiden | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|qid=Q521316|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}}{{ill|lt=Tarui|Q1345531|qid=Q1345531|1=Tarui, Gifu}}Iwate Aza Ibuki 1484-1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Tatamihiko-no-Mikoto | 創建=Unknown | 社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small)
{{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|qid=Q864156|1=Mino Province}} Ninomiya
former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=kensha|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}} | 例祭={{ill|lt=April 2|Q2511|qid=Q2511|1=April 2}} | 本殿={{ill|lt=irimoya-zukuri|Q855025|qid=Q855025|1=East Asian hip-and-gable roof}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Ibuki Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} [[Image:Ibuki-Jinjya-Tarui01.JPG|thumb|200px|Approach (photo taken in 2007)]] '''Ibuki Shrine''' (いぶきじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Tarui|Q1345531|qid=Q1345531|1=Tarui, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|qid=Q521316|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, and its former rank in the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=kensha|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}}. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=ninomiya|Q1656379|qid=Q1656379|lt=second shrine|1=Ichinomiya}} of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|qid=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}. The shrine buildings face east-southeast and are laid out with {{ill|lt=Mount Ibuki|Q2624360|qid=Q2624360|1=Mount Ibuki}} behind them. ===Enshrined deity=== The enshrined deity of Ibuki Shrine is not clearly established. There are several theories, including that it enshrines the ancestral deity of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ifuku clan|1=UNKNOWN}}, which held power in this region in ancient times: *Tatamihiko-no-Mikoto (also called Ebifuku-dake-no-kami, Ibuki-o-no-kami, and Ibuki-no-kami; deity of {{ill|lt=Mount Ibuki|Q2624360|qid=Q2624360|1=Mount Ibuki}}) *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Yamata no Orochi|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|qid=Q10940411|1=Amenohoakari}} *{{ill|lt=Ugayafukiaezu|Q1373935|qid=Q1373935|lt=Kusa-ashi-fuai-no-Mikoto|1=Ugayafukiaezu}} etc. ===Location=== *Iwate Aza Ibuki 1484-1, Tarui, Fuwa District, Gifu Prefecture **Nearest stations are {{ill|lt=Tarui Station|Q771019|qid=Q771019|1=Tarui Station (Gifu)}} on the {{ill|lt=Tōkaidō Main Line|Q1190152|qid=Q1190152|1=Tōkaidō Main Line}} or {{ill|lt=Sekigahara Station|Q872034|qid=Q872034|1=Sekigahara Station}}, both about 3.5 km away. **Nearest bus stop was "Ibuki-guchi" on the {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|qid=Q11415818|1=Meihan Kintetsu Bus}} Ōgaki-Sekigahara line, about 1.5 km away (route abolished in 2009). ===History=== *Founding date unknown. It is said to have existed by {{ill|lt=713|Q23523|qid=Q23523|1=713}} ({{ill|lt=Wadō|Q1373026|qid=Q1373026|1=Wadō (era)}} 6). *In {{ill|lt=1600|Q6720|qid=Q6720|1=1600}} ({{ill|lt=Keichō|Q1328185|qid=Q1328185|1=Keichō}} 5), the shrine buildings burned in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Sekigahara|Q234188|qid=Q234188|1=Battle of Sekigahara}}. *Rebuilt in {{ill|lt=1636|Q6885|qid=Q6885|1=1636}} ({{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|qid=Q1192913|1=Kan'ei}} 13). === Other === [[Image:Ibuki-Jinjya-Tarui06.JPG|thumb|100px|Great cedar standing on the left side of the haiden]] *The {{ill|lt=cedar|Q147388|qid=Q147388|1=Cryptomeria}} in the precincts, called the "Great Cedar of Ibuki Shrine," is a Gifu Prefecture designated natural monument. It is about 30 m tall, about 9.6 m around the roots, and estimated to be over 300 years old{{Cite web|和書|author= |date= |url=http://www.pref.gifu.lg.jp/kyoiku-bunka-sports/bunka-geijutsu/bunkazai-zuroku/bunkazai-zuroku/tenki/taruichou/ibuki.html |title=Great cedar of Ibuki Shrine |publisher=Gifu Prefecture |accessdate=2012-10-16}} . *The {{ill|lt=kagura|Q1348260|qid=Q1348260|1=Kagura}} of Ibuki Shrine began in {{ill|lt=1787|Q7763|qid=Q7763|1=1787}} ({{ill|lt=Tenmei|Q1194121|qid=Q1194121|1=Tenmei}} 7) as a prayer for a good harvest, and is offered annually on the second Sunday of April. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Ibuki-jinja (Tarui)}} * [http://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=2548&shrname=%E2%96%A0%E4%BC%8A%E5%AF%8C%E5%B2%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E2%96%A0 Ibuki Shrine Gifu Prefectural Shrine Association official homepage] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ibuki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ibuki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ibuki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Tarui]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:Natural Monuments Designated by Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Mino Province]] [[Category:Ni-no-Miya]]
